task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Share the direct link to a WeChat contact or open it within WeChat"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Use the phone's browser 'Share to WeChat' option if available"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Search for keywords, titles, or official account names in WeChat's search bar"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Browse historical posts or use built-in search in an official account profile"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "Explain limitations of WeChat's walled garden and lack of public indexing"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "Suggest external tools like Sogou or WeChat Index for broader searches"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "Open the article in WeChat app and copy the direct link via 'Copy Link' option"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "Attempt to access the article using Python requests with custom headers"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "Use Selenium to simulate WeChat's in-app browser for accessing sandboxed content"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "Set up mitmproxy to intercept WeChat traffic and extract article URLs"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "suggestExternalTools"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "attemptAccess"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node5", "type": "explainLimitations"}]}
